Notice Of Motion For Order Awarding Post Judgment Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin S. Eikenberry, Eikenberry Law Firm appearing for Plaintiff Incentive Financial Services, LLC, Telpehone 925-933-2161
No other appearance.

Ruling: The Court Vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: PLAINTIFF INCENTIVE FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC'S Motion For Order Awarding Post Judgment Attorney Fees. is GRANTED. No opposition is filed. Moving party is to prepare form of order. Judge Pro Tem: David Helbraun; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Continued To Nov-21-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David Rencher, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Incentive Financial Services, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Barry K. Lim.
Amended Default entered against defendant on July 9, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Incentive Financial Services, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Barry K. Lin as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,343.67.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,717.37.
Attorney's Fees - $2,375.00.
Costs - $350.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,786.04.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than September 4, 2008.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Default Prove-Up.
